rationale: The candidate provides a high-quality translation that captures Dan's direct and helpful tone. It correctly handles MDX components and asset paths. It uses natural Chinese technical terminology (e.g., '疑似' for 'potential', '撒大网' for 'cast a wide net'). It also correctly translates the alt text and captions while maintaining the structure of the original document. Compared to other candidates, it feels the most polished and professional.
